title: Phosphate Group
summary: A negatively charged group attached to the 5' carbon of molecules/deoxyribose in a DNA nucleotide. Phosphate groups link to the next nucleotide's 3'-OH via a structures/phosphodiester-bond, building up the structures/sugar-phosphate-backbone. The negative charges of phosphates make DNA migrate toward the positive electrode in techniques/gel-electrophoresis|gel electrophoresis.
